name: Saab Aktiebolag
description: Saab AB is a leading Swedish aerospace and defense company that provides advanced products, services, and solutions ranging from military defense to civil security. The company operates through several business areas, including Aeronautics, Dynamics, Surveillance, and Kockums, offering a diverse portfolio that includes the Gripen fighter jet, submarine technology, and sophisticated radar systems. Saab is committed to innovation and sustainability, serving a global market with a focus on maintaining safety and security for nations and individuals through cutting-edge technology and strategic partnerships.
